signal_cue_instantly.param: table[ $id = 'WarehouseFleetsConfigMenu', $columns = 2, $title = 'WarehouseFleets', $onOpen = BuildWarehouseFleetConfigMenu, ]
table[$text='Global Settings']

table[ $id = 'accountThreshold', $min = 0, $max = 100, $suffix = 'M', $default = 1, $text = 'Player Account Threshold (M)', $mouseOverText = 'WarehouseFleet ships will only buy from NPC stations if the player account will remain above this threshold (value in millions)' ]
table[ $id = 'transferToPlayer', $default = false, $text = 'Auto-transfer money', $mouseOverText = 'Enable auto-transfer of excess credits from warehouse accounts to player account', ]

table[ $id = 'failedOrderHandling', $options = [ table[$text='Refund (Default)', $value=1], table[$text='Teleport', $value=2], table[$text='Destroy', $value=3], table[$text='Return', $value=4], table[$text='Drop', $value=5] ], $text = 'Cargo emptying routine', $mouseOverText = 'Trade orders may fail and leave cargo unhandled in the ships. Select the method of cargo auto-handling below:

' + 'Refund: Wares are refunded back to the player based on their average prices. Shows up as a transfer on the transaction log

' + 'Teleport: wares are teleported to the warehouse

'+ 'Destroy: wares are destroyed

'+ 'Return: wares are returned to the warehouse through trade orders

'+ 'Drop: wares are dropped', ]
table[$text='Default Fleet Settings (applied when creating new WarehouseFleets)']

table[ $id = 'minCargoUsage', $min = 0, $max = 90, $suffix = '%', $default = 50, $text = 'Min. Cargo Usage (%)', $mouseOverText = 'Avoids scheduling inefficient trips. No ship will be scheduled that uses less than the specified cargo space. Setting this value too low can cause performance degradation. Setting the value too high might prevent/delay balancing of low volume wares. Ships supplying build storages may ignore this setting to avoid build jobs getting stuck with only a few materials left.' ]
table[$id = 'minCargoUsage']

table[ $id = 'tradeGatePenalty', $min = 0, $max = 90, $suffix = '%', $default = 20, $text = 'Trade: Gate Penalty (%)', $mouseOverText = 'Reduces the attractivity of trades in other sectors to keep travel distances short' ]
table[$id = 'tradeGatePenalty']
table[$id = 'prioDistribution', $min = 0, $max = 10, $suffix = '', $default = 5, $text = 'Prio: Distribute', $mouseOverText = 'Priority of ware distribution jobs']
table[$id = 'prioDistribution']
table[$id = 'prioTrade', $min = 0, $max = 10, $suffix = '', $default = 5, $text = 'Prio: Trade', $mouseOverText = 'Priority of jobs involving trade with other factions']
table[$id = 'prioTrade']
table[$id = 'prioSupply', $min = 0, $max = 10, $suffix = '', $default = 5, $text = 'Prio: Supply', $mouseOverText = 'Priority of jobs related to supply targets']
table[$id = 'prioSupply']
table[$id = 'prioBuild', $min = 0, $max = 10, $suffix = '', $default = 7, $text = 'Prio: Build', $mouseOverText = 'Priority of jobs supplying player-owned build storages']
table[$id = 'prioBuild']
table[$id = 'waitInDockS', $default = true, $text = 'Dock idle S-sized ships', $mouseOverText = 'S-sized ships should dock at their home warehouse while waiting for new delivery jobs']
table[$id = 'waitInDockS']
table[$id = 'waitInDockM', $default = true, $text = 'Dock idle M-sized ships', $mouseOverText = 'M-sized ships should dock at their home warehouse while waiting for new delivery jobs']
table[$id = 'waitInDockM']
table[$id = 'waitInDockL', $default = false, $text = 'Dock idle L-sized ships', $mouseOverText = 'L-sized ships should dock at their home warehouse while waiting for new delivery jobs']
table[$id = 'waitInDockL']
table[$col=1, $colSpan=2, $halign='center', $text=' ']
table[$col = 1, $text = event.param.$text]

table[ $col = 2, $id = event.param.$id, $checked = global.$WarehouseFleets.{'$' + event.param.$id}, $width = 'Helper.standardButtonHeight', $height = 'Helper.standardButtonHeight', $default = event.param.$default, $mouseOverText = event.param.$mouseOverText, $onClick = OnUpdateCheckbox, ]
table[$col = 1, $text = event.param.$text]

table[ $col = 2, $id = event.param.$id, $start = global.$WarehouseFleets.{'$' + event.param.$id}, $min = event.param.$min, $max = event.param.$max, $suffix = event.param.$suffix, $default = event.param.$default, $mouseOverText = event.param.$mouseOverText, $onSliderCellConfirm = OnUpdateSlider, ]
table[$col = 1, $text = event.param.$text]

table[ $col = 2, $id = event.param.$id, $options = event.param.$options, $startOption = global.$WarehouseFleets.{'$' + event.param.$id}, $mouseOverText = event.param.$mouseOverText, $onDropDownConfirmed = OnUpdateDropdown, ]
table[ $col = 2, $id = event.param.$id, $text = table[$text='Apply to all fleets now'], $mouseOverText = 'Applies this setting to all existing WarehouseFleets.', $onClick = OnSyncButtonPressed ]
table[ $col = 1, $colSpan = 2, $halign = 'center', $text = event.param.$text, ]
